earned_achievements.description: Survive a long fall with just a sliver of health remaining.

earned_achievements.description: Defeat King Slime, the lord of all things slimy.

earned_achievements.name: Hero of Etheria
earned_achievements.description: Repel the strongest forces the Old One's Army can muster.

earned_achievements.name: Infinity +1 Sword
earned_achievements.description: Obtain the Zenith, the culmination of a journey forged into the ultimate sword.

earned_achievements.name: Dye Hard
earned_achievements.description: Equip a dye in every possible dye slot.

earned_achievements.name: Fae Flayer
earned_achievements.description: Defeat the Empress of Light, responsible for all those flashy lights and glitter.

earned_achievements.name: Real Estate Agent
earned_achievements.description: Have all possible town NPCs living in your world.

earned_achievements.name: Sword of the Hero
earned_achievements.description: Obtain a Terra Blade, forged from the finest blades of light and darkness.

earned_achievements.name: Ice Scream
earned_achievements.description: Reach the 15th wave of a frost moon, where the festive season quickly degrades into madness.

earned_achievements.name: Baleful Harvest
earned_achievements.description: Reach the 15th wave of a pumpkin moon, where evil lurks among the autumn harvest.

earned_achievements.name: Star Destroyer
earned_achievements.description: Defeat the four celestial towers of the moon.

earned_achievements.name: Topped Off
earned_achievements.description: Attain maximum health and mana possible without accessories or buffs.

earned_achievements.name: Leading Landlord
earned_achievements.description: Meet with a tenant who's as happy as they possibly can be!

earned_achievements.name: Obsessive Devotion
earned_achievements.description: Defeat the Ancient Cultist, fanatical leader of the dungeon coven.

earned_achievements.name: Jolly Jamboree
earned_achievements.description: What you're celebrating doesn't matter, just throw a party already!

earned_achievements.name: Fish Out of Water
earned_achievements.description: Defeat Duke Fishron, mutant terror of the sea.

earned_achievements.name: Tin-Foil Hatter
earned_achievements.description: Triumph over a martian invasion, when beings from out of this world come to scramble your brains and probe you in uncomfortable places.

earned_achievements.name: Kill the Sun
earned_achievements.description: Survive a solar eclipse, a day darker than night filled with creatures of horror.

earned_achievements.name: Lihzahrdian Idol
earned_achievements.description: Defeat Golem, the stone-faced ritualistic idol of the lihzahrd tribe.

earned_achievements.name: Temple Raider
earned_achievements.description: Breach the impenetrable walls of the jungle temple.

earned_achievements.name: It Can Talk?!
earned_achievements.description: Build a house in a mushroom biome and have the Truffle move in.

earned_achievements.name: Funkytown
earned_achievements.description: Build or encounter a glowing mushroom field above the surface.

earned_achievements.name: Just Desserts
earned_achievements.description: Defeat Queen Slime, giving the coup-de-grace to the sovereign of all that jiggles.

earned_achievements.name: There are Some Who Call Him...
Robbing the Grave
earned_achievements.description: Obtain a rare treasure from a difficult monster in the dungeon.

earned_achievements.name: The Great Southern Plantkill
earned_achievements.description: Defeat Plantera, the overgrown monstrosity of the jungle's depths.

earned_achievements.name: Get a Life
earned_achievements.description: Consume a life fruit, which grows in the thick of subterranean jungle grass.

earned_achievements.name: Photosynthesis
earned_achievements.description: Mine chlorophyte, an organic ore found deep among the thickest of flora.

earned_achievements.name: Drax Attax
earned_achievements.description: Craft a drax or pickaxe axe using hallowed bars, and the souls of the three mechanical bosses.

earned_achievements.name: Buckets of Bolts
earned_achievements.description: Defeat the three nocturnal mechanical menaces: the Twins, the Destroyer, and Skeletron Prime.

earned_achievements.name: Quiet Neighborhood
earned_achievements.description: Enter a misty graveyard filled with the surly dead.

earned_achievements.name: Fashion Statement
earned_achievements.description: Equip armor or vanity clothing in all three social slots.

earned_achievements.name: Into Orbit
earned_achievements.description: You can only go down from here!

earned_achievements.name: Walk the Plank
earned_achievements.description: Triumph over a pirate invasion, a group of pillagers from the sea out for your booty... and your life!

earned_achievements.name: The Frequent Flyer
earned_achievements.description: Spend over 1 gold being treated by the nurse.

earned_achievements.name: Extra Shiny!
earned_achievements.description: Mine a powerful ore that has been newly blessed upon your world.

earned_achievements.name: Miner for Fire
earned_achievements.description: Craft a molten pickaxe using the hottest of materials.

earned_achievements.name: Begone, Evil!
earned_achievements.description: Smash a demon or crimson altar with a powerful, holy hammer.

earned_achievements.name: It's Hard!
earned_achievements.description: Unleash the ancient spirits of light and darkness across your world, enabling much stronger foes and showering the world with dazzling treasures (and rainbows!).

earned_achievements.name: Still Hungry
earned_achievements.description: Defeat the Wall of Flesh, the master and core of the world who arises after a great, burning sacrifice.

earned_achievements.name: Vehicular Manslaughter
earned_achievements.description: Defeat an enemy by running it over with a minecart.

earned_achievements.name: Marathon Medalist
earned_achievements.description: Travel a total of 26.2 miles on foot.

earned_achievements.name: Sting Operation
earned_achievements.description: Defeat the Queen Bee, the matriarch of the jungle hives.

earned_achievements.name: Where's My Honey?
earned_achievements.description: Discover a large bee's hive deep in the jungle.

earned_achievements.name: Dead Men Tell No Tales
earned_achievements.description: You were so preoccupied with whether or not you could open the chest that you didn't stop to think if you should.

earned_achievements.name: Goblin Punter

earned_achievements.name: Bloodbath
earned_achievements.description: Survive a blood moon, a nocturnal event where the rivers run red and monsters swarm aplenty.

earned_achievements.description: Steal a key from the dungeon's undead denizens, and unlock one of their precious golden chests.

earned_achievements.name: Boned
earned_achievements.description: Defeat Skeletron, the cursed guardian of the dungeon.

earned_achievements.name: No Hobo

earned_achievements.name: It's Getting Hot in Here
earned_achievements.description: Spelunk deep enough to reach the molten underworld.

earned_achievements.name: Mastermind
earned_achievements.description: Defeat the Brain of Cthulhu, an enourmous demon brain which haunts the creeping crimson.

earned_achievements.name: Smashing, Poppet!
earned_achievements.description: Using explosives or your trusty hammer, smash a Shadow Orb or Crimson Heart in the evil parts of your world.

earned_achievements.name: Star Power
earned_achievements.description: Craft a mana crystal out of fallen stars, and consume it.

earned_achievements.name: Eye on You
earned_achievements.description: Defeat the Eye of Cthulhu, an ocular menace who only appears at night.

earned_achievements.name: Jeepers Creepers
earned_achievements.description: Stumble into a spider cavern in the underground.

earned_achievements.name: Watch Your Step!

earned_achievements.description: Discover and smash your first heart crystal underground.

earned_achievements.name: Heavy Metal
earned_achievements.description: Obtain an anvil made from iron or lead.

earned_achievements.name: You Can Do It!

earned_achievements.name: Matching Attire

earned_achievements.name: Ooo! Shiny!

earned_achievements.name: It rubs the lotion on its skin!
